nasb.text: And a leper *came to Jesus, beseeching Him and falling on his knees before Him, and saying, “If You are willing, You can make me clean.”

esv.text: And a leper came to him, imploring him, and kneeling said to him, “If you will, you can make me clean.”

cnv.text: 有一個患痲風的人，來到耶穌跟前，跪下求他說：“如果你肯，必能使我潔淨。”

ccb.text: 有一次，一个患麻风病的人来到耶稣面前，跪下央求：“只要你肯，一定能使我洁净。”

csbs.text: 有一个麻风病人来到耶稣面前，跪下来恳求他说：“如果你愿意，你就能洁净我。”
